title: The DOMINATION mod
body:
**This mod offers unique tools of mass destruction!!!**
---------------------
- **_Executor_**: time, size and tick speed manipulation! (Craft requires dragon egg)
- _**Netherite redstone gauntlet**_: on right click transforms player into spectator mode (for limited time) and requires 25 xp levels to work. On Right click + Shift gives you Haste 5 for 90 seconds and requires 8 xp levels to work.
- **_Techno gauntlet_**: spectral vision on right click in 96x96 radius for 16 xp levels. On right click + Shift allows to insta break any block for 1 xp level.
- **_Thermal Ultra Scythe_**: On right click you can make dash with some cooldown. On hit Inflicts entity with variety of negative effects.
- **_Briefcase_**: Holy destruction system (requires Executor to work).
- **_Kill Note_**: Write down entity ID or player name to kill it.
- **_Infuser_**: Creates _**The DOMINATION Cube**_.
- Effects: Creative fly.
- 7 Ability Cubes.
- **_BlockerZero_**: Sends redstone signal to some blocks.
- _**Empty and (------) Crowns.**_

Every item has its unique craft and usage. I HIGHLY recomend to use _**REI**_ or similar mods.

Can I use this mod in my modpack?
----------------
Go ahead! Just make ensure you abide by the following conditions:

You cannot claim that you own the entirety, or any parts, of this mod You must cite the author(s) of this mod You must provide a link back to this page

Feel free to ask questions on our [Official Tremor Studio Discord server](https://discord.gg/3CCcQJeUqp)!
------------------
